strategy: per-(category x anchor_regime) optimal (placement_minute, bid_offset) from Path B v1 Section 3 (argmax expected_improvement_cents per cell), applied per N. Replaces v2's universal 15c.

underdog_harvest.note: ~$385 of improvement from the three lowest regimes that the universal 15c rule clamped away (1c bid, ~zero fill). Top per-regime ROI lifts are the r05_14 cells (+17 to +21pp; small capital denominator).

validation_gates.gate4_fill_matches_v1: PASS exact — v3 per-regime fill rates reproduce v1 optimal-cell fill rates with max |delta|=0.0pp across all 36 cells.

deviations: Per-regime conditioning adds only +0.48pp over the universal 15c rule (diminishing returns per Plex Round 6): favorites dominate absolute PnL and their v1-optimal offset is already 15c (favorite cells unchanged v2->v3); the incremental gain is the underdog/mid harvest (~$385) the universal rule clamped away (net +$269 after small offset-choice washes on a few favorite/mid cells).
Same substrate as v2 (size_qual_max_250 exit-replay proxy); same pre-realism caveat (B25 0.5-0.7x not applied); exit_minute not recorded.
Per-regime offset lookup is corpus-level hindsight, but each cell's optimum is observable a priori from the anchor regime (not per-event foresight) -> deployable.
